General.Name: Playtika Holding Corp
General.Description: Playtika Holding Corp., together with its subsidiaries, develops mobile games in the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia Pacific, and internationally. The company owns a portfolio of casual and social casino-themed games. It distributes its games to the end customer through various web and mobile platforms and direct-to-consumer platforms. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Herzliya Pituach, Israel. Playtika Holding Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Playtika Holding UK II Limited.
